title: Raccoon Removal Edison, NJ | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Edison, NJ. Licensed experts serving Edison homes and businesses. Safe, humane trapping and exclusion services. Call today for fast response!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Edison, NJ, where they find ample shelter in attics, crawl spaces, and commercial properties throughout this diverse township. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services to Edison residents and businesses, using humane trapping methods and proven exclusion techniques. Our certified wildlife technicians respond quickly to protect your property from raccoon damage and health hazards.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings decades of wildlife control experience to Edison, with licensed technicians who understand local raccoon behavior patterns and New Jersey wildlife regulations. We offer comprehensive solutions from initial inspection through complete exclusion and sanitation, with upfront pricing and guaranteed results for your Edison property.
localContext: Edison's mix of residential neighborhoods, the Menlo Park Mall area, and proximity to Roosevelt Park creates ideal habitats for raccoons seeking food and shelter. From the historic homes near Oak Tree Road to modern developments in North Edison, raccoons frequently exploit attic vents, chimneys, and roof access points in the township's diverse housing stock.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Edison typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access points requiring exclusion, and necessary repairs. Our team provides free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Edison neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common throughout Edison, particularly in established neighborhoods with mature trees and near wooded areas like Roosevelt Park. They're attracted to garbage, pet food, and easily accessible attics and crawl spaces in both residential and commercial properties.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal humane and legal in Edison?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We follow all New Jersey wildlife regulations and use humane live trapping methods. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical raccoon removal practices, ensuring animals are handled safely and relocated according to state guidelines.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Edison?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Edison locations. Raccoon problems require prompt attention, especially if animals are in living spaces or causing active damage, so we prioritize emergency calls and work efficiently to resolve your wildlife issue.
